features.description: Agentic tool loop with scout/query/submit phases
acceptance_criteria: Claude calls scout_catalog to browse products per category
Claude calls query_catalog for targeted refinement when needed
Claude calls submit_build to finalize component selection
Loop respects max_tool_turns (20) and timeout (120s)
features.notes: Core agentic loop fully implemented in claude.py

features.description: Build compatibility validation (socket, DDR, form factor, PSU, GPU)
acceptance_criteria: Socket match enforced between CPU and motherboard
DDR type match enforced between RAM and motherboard
Form factor rank check (motherboard fits in case)
GPU length check against case max_gpu_length
PSU wattage sufficiency check with 1.3x headroom
features.notes: BuildValidator with 7 rules, repair flow up to 1 attempt

features.description: Input guardrails (blocklist, budget, duplicate detection)
acceptance_criteria: Toxicity blocklist catches abuse patterns
Budget range validated (€50–€100k)
Duplicate request detection via SHA-256 hash + TTLCache (3 per 600s per IP)

features.description: Output guardrails (prompt leak, off-topic, URL allowlist, PII, price)
acceptance_criteria: Prompt leak detection blocks system prompt exposure
Off-topic/refusal detection blocks non-hardware responses
Affiliate URL allowlist strips non-Amazon URLs
Price sanity strips invalid prices and warns on budget overage
PII strip removes phone, email, external URLs from summary

features.description: SSE streaming for build progress events
acceptance_criteria: SSE stream returns progress events with phase/turn/elapsed
Result event contains full BuildResult JSON
Error events sent as SSE (not HTTP status) after stream starts
Keepalive comments sent every 15s of inactivity

features.description: Build result caching via request_hash in PostgreSQL
acceptance_criteria: Identical requests return cached result without calling Claude
Cached results bypass rate limit and duplicate detection
Build results persisted with unique request_hash

features.description: Component search endpoint (POST /api/v1/search)
acceptance_criteria: Accepts category + description and returns single component recommendation
Uses agentic tool loop with search-specific tools
In-memory cache (30 min TTL, 128 entries)
Shares rate limit pool with /build

features.description: Rate limiting (shared AI pool + read limits)
acceptance_criteria: POST /build and POST /search share single rate limit pool
GET /build/{id} has separate rate limit
Rate limiting disabled in development environment
Configurable via RATE_LIMIT_AI and RATE_LIMIT_READ env vars

features.description: Product catalog seeding from JSON + hardcoded peripherals
acceptance_criteria: Loads ~200 products from all_products.json
Appends hardcoded peripherals (monitors, keyboards, mice)
Idempotent seeding (checks row count before insert)
Clears search cache after seeding
features.notes: 277 total components across 11 categories

features.description: Prompt sanitization and injection defence
acceptance_criteria: User input truncated to 2000 chars
XML-like tags stripped from input
Injection patterns detected and logged
Structural chars neutralized (backticks, dashes)

features.description: Database migrations with Alembic
acceptance_criteria: Initial migration creates builds table
Second migration creates components + affiliate_links tables
Migrations run via make migrate

features.description: Comprehensive test suite (7 test files)
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover API, guardrails, validator, catalog, tool loop, models, seeding
In-memory SQLite with JSONB→JSON fallback
Mocked Anthropic API
All tests pass with pytest

features.description: Build form with budget/goal selection and preferences
acceptance_criteria: 5 budget ranges selectable
7 user goals filtered per budget via budget_goals.json
Form factor, CPU brand, GPU brand, cooling preferences
Existing parts exclusion checkboxes
Optional notes textarea (500 char max)

features.description: SSE streaming progress display with slot reveals
acceptance_criteria: BuildLoadingScreen shows 8 core component slots
Slots reveal progressively with 350ms intervals
Progress bar with phase-weighted calculation
Elapsed timer displays mm:ss

features.description: Build result page with component cards and affiliate links
acceptance_criteria: Component cards show name, brand, specs, price
Affiliate links validated against allowlist before rendering
Upgrade/downgrade suggestions displayed
Shareable URL with copy button
sessionStorage caching for post-submit navigation

features.description: Component search page (find single component)
acceptance_criteria: 12 category icons selectable
Description textarea with category-specific placeholders
Single component result with affiliate link and price
60s timeout independent from build

features.description: Homepage with hero, how-it-works, example builds, trust signals
acceptance_criteria: Hero section with CTAs to /build and /find
3-step how-it-works grid
4 example build cards with budget/goal links
Trust signals section
